notice: 1.3.4 - clearer preview and a tidier template: Walls/Partitions show the real count, Roofs shows skylight details, the window columns are now 'Win 1/2 Qty' (window count, like HAP), and the sheets come as a clean bordered grid.
notes: 1.3.4 - Walls/Partitions preview shows the real row count; Roofs preview shows Exposure / Slope / Skylight Qty / Skylight Construction; the window columns are now 'Win 1 Qty' / 'Win 2 Qty' (window count, matching HAP; old workbooks still load); and the Walls/Partitions sheets come as a clean bordered grid ready to fill. Just click Update now.
